greeting.text: Greetings, traveler! {pause:0.3} <shake>I am the Guide, {pause:0.3} </shake> and I will teach you about the world. {pause:0.3} Welcome!

effects_intro.text: First, let me show you something. {pause:0.3} This world is alive, and words have power. {pause:0.3} <shake>Watch this.</shake>

shake_explain.text: That was the Shake effect. {pause:0.2} <shake>It makes the text tremble,</shake> like the ground beneath your feet. {pause:0.3} Use it for emphasis or when something dramatic happens.

choices.text: Can you combine it with other effects?

color_intro.text: Now watch the colors. {pause:0.3} <color:#FF0000>Red for danger,</color> {pause:0.2} <color:#00FF00>green for hope,</color> {pause:0.2} <color:#FFD700>gold for wisdom.</color> {pause:0.3} Each color tells a story.

choices.text: Can you mix colors and shake?

mix_effects.text: Of course! <shake><color:#FF00FF>You can combine shake and color,</color></shake> {pause:0.2} <shake><color:#00FFFF>or any other effect.</color></shake> {pause:0.3} The possibilities are endless.

pause_explain.text: Pauses create rhythm. {pause:0.5} They let words breathe. {pause:0.3} {pause:0.2} See? {pause:0.4} A moment of silence can be as powerful as words.

music_intro.text: Music shapes the mood. {pause:0.3} The world has many songs, {pause:0.2} and they change with the story. {pause:0.3} Listen carefully, and you will always know what to feel.

music_demo.text: I cannot change it here, {pause:0.2} but know this: {pause:0.3} <shake>When the music changes,</shake> {pause:0.2} the world changes with it. {pause:0.3} <color:#FFD700>Remember this.</color>

summary.text: So, to summarize: {pause:0.3} <shake>Shake</shake> for impact, {pause:0.2} <color:#FF0000>colors</color> for emotion, {pause:0.2} pauses for rhythm, {pause:0.2} and music for soul. {pause:0.5} <shake><color:#FFD700>Go forth and explore!</color></shake>

final.text: Farewell, traveler. {pause:0.3} May your journey be <shake><color:#00FF00>extraordinary.</color></shake> {pause:0.5} Goodbye.

goodbye.text: Very well. {pause:0.2} If you change your mind, {pause:0.2} <shake>I will be here.</shake>
